name: Fruit Coctail Cake Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook sugar and margarine over medium heat until the mixture reaches soft ball stage (235°F on an oven-safe thermometer).
2. Gradually add evaporated milk to the hot sugar and butter mixture while stirring constantly.
3. Return the mixture to the heat source and continue cooking, without stirring, until it reaches 220°F.
4. Remove from heat and stir in chopped pecans and shredded coconut.
5. Pour over the hot fruit cocktail cake.
